emotional_tone: Authority, Clarity, Truth, Objective, Rigid, Functional

layout.grid_classes: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6

cards.style: Flat solid background, 1px subtle border, no shadow unless hovered.
cards.hover: hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-black/30 hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-200 ease-out

headers.style: Solid Background with a hard bottom border.

buttons.primary: bg-[#002FA7] text-white hover:bg-[#002FA7]/90 rounded-sm px-6 py-2 font-medium tracking-wide transition-colors duration-200
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#0A0A0A] hover:bg-[#0A0A0A] hover:text-white rounded-sm px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-colors duration-200
buttons.danger: bg-[#FF3B30] text-white hover:bg-[#FF3B30]/90 rounded-sm px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-colors duration-200

badges.success: bg-[#34C759]/10 text-[#34C759] border border-[#34C759]/20 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-sm text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-bold
badges.warning: bg-[#FFCC00]/10 text-[#FFCC00] border border-[#FFCC00]/20 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-sm text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-bold
badges.danger: bg-[#FF3B30]/10 text-[#FF3B30] border border-[#FF3B30]/20 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-sm text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-bold
badges.neutral: bg-black/5 text-black border border-black/10 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-sm text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-bold

inputs.classes: border border-black/20 rounded-sm px-4 py-2 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7]/30 focus:border-[#002FA7] outline-none transition-all bg-white font-mono text-sm

icons.instructions: Use Phosphor Icons for a clean, dense, technical look. Install with `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react`.

interactions.hover: Must explicitly change background and text color on hover. Use smooth transitions: `transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out`.
interactions.focus: High contrast focus rings required on all interactive elements: `focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7]/50 focus:outline-none`.
interactions.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="build-pipeline-btn"`).

images.description: Code screen close-up. Use as a very low-opacity background texture (e.g., opacity-5 or opacity-10) in hero sections or empty states to give a technical feel.
Abstract cybersecurity representation. Use in onboarding screens, login pages, or documentation headers.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install specific fonts via Google Fonts (Chivo, IBM Plex Mono) into index.css.
Do NOT use 'Inter', 'Roboto', or 'Open Sans' for headings.
Do NOT use pure #000000 or #808080. Always use tinted greys or #0A0A0A.
Adopt 'The Control Room Grid' for the dashboard layout. Ensure grid items are direct children.
Use Shadcn UI for complex components, but customize borders to be 1px solid black/10 with rounded-none or rounded-sm for the Swiss Brutalist look.
Emphasize the 'Monochrome + Functional Color' rule: 95% of UI is B&W/Grayscale. Only use primary/accent colors for real statuses (Success/Fail/Build).
Ensure all interactive elements have explicit `data-testid` attributes.
Create and use `.js` or `.jsx` files instead of `.tsx` files if applicable.
